metadata.description: Portable Agent Skills that raise a Maven/Gradle project PIT mutation score: detect the JDK the project needs, find mutants the tests run but do not verify, and add append-only tests that detect them without weakening any existing test.

plugins.name: java-mutation-testing
plugins.description: Detect the project Java version, then raise its PIT mutation score by improving the mutation score with append-only tests (standard tools only).
